-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- PK Paradise -- #bLeft Wing -- #b -- #bFirst Room: -- #bNormal PK -- #b -- #bMiddle Room: -- #bGravity PK -- #b -- #bLast Room: -- #bDrunk PK -- #b -- #bRoom Commands: -- #bfocus on -- #bfocus off;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- PK Paradise -- #bRight Wing -- #b -- #bFirst Room: -- #bFull Hearts PK -- #b -- #bMiddle Room: -- #bBlind PK -- #b -- #bLast Room: -- #bIce PK -- #b -- #bRoom Commands: -- #bfocus on -- #bfocus off;
